transcription.text: It's been one week since you looked at me Cause you hit me with a sign that said I'm hungry 5 days since you laughed at me, saiyan We can never come back and see me Yesterday, you've forgiven me But it'll still be today, till us, and I'm sorry Gonna make a big a dig a dig a lick a stick a dig a jig I like vanilla, it's the finest of the flavors Gonna see that show, cause I don't know that vertical Is that my go-ah-sit's a banger, is that me? You're allowed to sign a waver I have a tendency to win my mind, never sleep I haven't seen you since you've been there It's been one week since you looked at me Dropped around the side, since I'm sorry Thank you.

segments.text: It's been one week since you looked at me
Cause you hit me with a sign that said I'm hungry
5 days since you laughed at me, saiyan
We can never come back and see me
But it'll still be today, till us, and I'm sorry
Gonna make a big a dig a dig a lick a stick a dig a jig
I like vanilla, it's the finest of the flavors
Gonna see that show, cause I don't know that vertical
Is that my go-ah-sit's a banger, is that me?
You're allowed to sign a waver
I have a tendency to win my mind, never sleep
I haven't seen you since you've been there
It's been one week since you looked at me
Dropped around the side, since I'm sorry
